name: Kshadyantra
overview: Pannaben is the master of politics and is the CM of a state. She has been the CM for 15 years and people love her as a leader. After a sudden turn of events, everyone wants to be the stakeholder of the chair in the family. An edge of the seat thriller which keeps you guessing the game.

trailers.title: Kshadyantra | Trailer | Gujarati Web Series | Releasing on ShemarooMe | 24th June 2021
